executor_evidence: T00 bootstrapped provisional Phase 3 coordination artifacts: ownership.json with 44 ownership entries (originally 40 at bootstrap; first correction added own-T02-helper-test-fix sequenced_write for T02 reviewer-confirmed test-defect fixes; second correction added own-T04-phase2-test-fix exclusive_write for T04 Phase 2 compatibility test fix; third correction added own-T06-current-work-test-fix sequenced_write for T06 final-verification defect fixes and converted T05 current-work test entry to sequenced_write for serial sharing) covering all planned workflow artifacts (spec, evidence, plan, state, ledger, ownership, mailbox, final-review), verification records T00-T06, planned helper/test files (workflow-coordination-artifacts.ts, helper tests, contract tests, current-work tests), and planned skill docs (spec, plan, pre-execute-alignment, execute, final-review). Created mailbox.jsonl with 3 bootstrap records: orchestrator status_update for ownership/mailbox init, executor_handoff for T01+ protocol, and status_update for T01 evidence protocol reminder. Created verification/T00.json. All entries use canonical fields, exact repo-relative paths, target_type path only, and correct ownership modes per the approved plan. Registry corrections are recorded as T00 bootstrap corrections because no execution task owns ownership.json except T00 (sequenced_write) and T05 (sequenced_write, for finalization only).

diagnostics_status.summary: T00 creates JSON/JSONL artifacts only; no TypeScript code changes so no LSP/typecheck diagnostics apply.

attribution_limitations: T00 is the first execution task; pre-registry artifacts (spec, evidence, plan, state, ledger) existed before T00 established the provisional ownership registry. pre_registry_bootstrap provenance is used for these pre-existing artifacts.
notes: state.json is orchestrator_owned; T00 updated it only as part of the bootstrap protocol on behalf of the orchestrator. The matching ownership entry is own-state-orchestrator and this T00 evidence uses attribution_method pre_registry_bootstrap as explicit provenance for the bootstrap state update, not as an exemption from ownership coverage.
ledger.jsonl append is covered by own-ledger-T00 shared_append entry.
Pre-existing workflow artifacts (spec.md, evidence.md, plan.md) are read-only and were not modified.

T00 creates JSON/JSONL coordination artifacts only. No code execution, filesystem mutation logic, shell commands, authentication, secrets handling, git operations, network calls, dependency changes, sandbox behavior, or untrusted-input handling is introduced. Security triggers do not apply.
